title: astragalus tortuosus
intro: Astragalus tortuosus, also known as the twisting astragalus or tortuous milkvetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the pea family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Astragalus tortuosus include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
